falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Temporal Visibility can safely serve as the primary automation-grade liveness index for monitoring and repair loops.
falsificationQueries: Temporal visibility eventual consistency list workflow executions stale running
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Visibility is excellent for operator discovery but is not strongly consistent enough to be the sole repair-loop truth source. The design must use Visibility for discovery and per-execution workflow calls or a Convex projection for automation-grade decisions.
